---
title: "Chicago cameras crashes"
format: html
  toc: ture
  code-fold: true
execute:
  echo: true
  warning: false
  message: false
---

```{python}
import pandas as pd
import numpy as np
import geopandas as gpd
from shapely import wkt
import altair as alt
import json

alt.data_transformers.disable_max_rows()

SPEED_FP = "/Users/xinyi/final-project-chicago-crashes/data/raw-data/Speed_Camera_Locations_20260222.csv"
COMM_FP  = "/Users/xinyi/final-project-chicago-crashes/data/raw-data/Boundaries_-_Community_Areas_20260122.csv"
CRASH_FP = "/Users/xinyi/Desktop/Traffic_Crashes_-_Crashes_20260224.csv"
RED_FP   = "/Users/xinyi/final-project-chicago-crashes/data/raw-data/Red_Light_Camera_Locations_20260122.csv"

speed = pd.read_csv(SPEED_FP)
comm  = pd.read_csv(COMM_FP)
crash = pd.read_csv(CRASH_FP)
redlight = pd.read_csv(RED_FP)
```


Clean speed data
```{python}
speed["GO-LIVE DATE"] = pd.to_datetime(speed["GO-LIVE DATE"], errors="coerce")
speed["year"] = speed["GO-LIVE DATE"].dt.year

speed["LATITUDE"] = pd.to_numeric(speed["LATITUDE"], errors="coerce")
speed["LONGITUDE"] = pd.to_numeric(speed["LONGITUDE"], errors="coerce")
speed = speed.dropna(subset=["LATITUDE", "LONGITUDE"])


speed[["GO-LIVE DATE","year","LATITUDE","LONGITUDE"]].head()
```


We built three plots to compare the geographic distribution of crashes and traffic cameras across Chicago community areas.
First, this heatmap shows total crash counts by community area. We set up a function to read the community boundaries data and convert it to a GeoDataFrame. It also has an optional plotting feature to visualize the boundaries. 
```{python}
def community_boundaries(plot=False):
    base_dir = Path(__file__).resolve().parent
    repo_dir = base_dir.parent
    path = repo_dir / "data" / "raw-data" / "Boundaries_-_Community_Areas_20260122.csv"

    df = pd.read_csv(path)

    boundaries_gdf = gpd.GeoDataFrame(
        df,
        geometry=gpd.GeoSeries.from_wkt(df["the_geom"]),
        crs="EPSG:4326"
    )

    if plot:
        fig, ax = plt.subplots(figsize=(8, 8))
        boundaries_gdf.plot(ax=ax, edgecolor="black", linewidth=0.6, facecolor="none")
        ax.set_axis_off()
        plt.show()

    return boundaries_gdf
```


map-speed cameras
```{python}
comm_gdf = gpd.GeoDataFrame(
    comm.copy(),
    geometry=comm["the_geom"].apply(wkt.loads),
    crs="EPSG:4326"
)

speed_gdf = gpd.GeoDataFrame(
    speed.copy(),
    geometry=gpd.points_from_xy(speed["LONGITUDE"], speed["LATITUDE"]),
    crs="EPSG:4326"
)

speed_comm = gpd.sjoin(speed_gdf, comm_gdf, how="left", predicate="within")

camera_counts = (
    speed_comm.groupby("COMMUNITY")
    .size()
    .reset_index(name="num_cameras")
)

comm_gdf = comm_gdf.merge(camera_counts, on="COMMUNITY", how="left")
comm_gdf["num_cameras"] = comm_gdf["num_cameras"].fillna(0).astype(int)
```

```{python}
PALETTE_MAIN = ["#e0f3db", "#a8ddb5", "#43a2ca"]
PALETTE_CONTRAST = ["#fee8c8", "#fdbb84", "#e34a33"]
```

```{python}
def map_speed_cameras(comm_gdf, speed_gdf, palette, title):
    comm_geojson = json.loads(comm_gdf.to_json())
    points_df = speed_gdf[["LONGITUDE","LATITUDE"]].dropna().copy()

    base = (
        alt.Chart(alt.Data(values=comm_geojson["features"]))
        .mark_geoshape(stroke="white", strokeWidth=0.5)
        .encode(
            color=alt.Color(
                "properties.num_cameras:Q",
                scale=alt.Scale(range=palette), 
                legend=alt.Legend(title="Speed cameras")
            ),
            tooltip=[
                alt.Tooltip("properties.COMMUNITY:N", title="Community"),
                alt.Tooltip("properties.num_cameras:Q", title="Num cameras"),
            ],
        )
        .project(type="mercator")
        .properties(width=650, height=650, title=title)
    )

    pts = (
        alt.Chart(points_df)
        .mark_circle(size=12, opacity=0.5, color=palette[-1])
        .encode(longitude="LONGITUDE:Q", latitude="LATITUDE:Q")
    )

    return base + pts

map_speed_cameras(comm_gdf, speed_gdf, PALETTE_MAIN, "Speed cameras by community")
```



clean red light data
```{python}
redlight["GO LIVE DATE"] = pd.to_datetime(redlight["GO LIVE DATE"], errors="coerce")
redlight["year"] = redlight["GO LIVE DATE"].dt.year

redlight["LATITUDE"] = pd.to_numeric(redlight["LATITUDE"], errors="coerce")
redlight["LONGITUDE"] = pd.to_numeric(redlight["LONGITUDE"], errors="coerce")
redlight = redlight.dropna(subset=["LATITUDE", "LONGITUDE"]).copy()

redlight[["GO LIVE DATE", "year", "LATITUDE", "LONGITUDE"]].head()
```


speed-redlight cameras
```{python}
red_gdf = gpd.GeoDataFrame(
    redlight.copy(),
    geometry=gpd.points_from_xy(redlight["LONGITUDE"], redlight["LATITUDE"]),
    crs="EPSG:4326"
)

red_comm = gpd.sjoin(red_gdf, comm_gdf, how="left", predicate="within")

red_counts = (
    red_comm.groupby("COMMUNITY")
    .size()
    .reset_index(name="num_red_cameras")
)

comm_red_gdf = comm_gdf.merge(red_counts, on="COMMUNITY", how="left")
comm_red_gdf["num_red_cameras"] = comm_red_gdf["num_red_cameras"].fillna(0).astype(int)

red_counts.sort_values("num_red_cameras", ascending=False).head(10)
```

```{python}
def map_redlight_cameras(comm_gdf_in, red_gdf_in, palette, title):
    comm_geojson = json.loads(comm_gdf_in.to_json())
    points_df = red_gdf_in[["LONGITUDE","LATITUDE"]].dropna().copy()

    base = (
        alt.Chart(alt.Data(values=comm_geojson["features"]))
        .mark_geoshape(stroke="white", strokeWidth=0.5)
        .encode(
            color=alt.Color(
                "properties.num_red_cameras:Q",
                scale=alt.Scale(range=palette),
                legend=alt.Legend(title="Red light cameras")
            ),
            tooltip=[
                alt.Tooltip("properties.COMMUNITY:N", title="Community"),
                alt.Tooltip("properties.num_red_cameras:Q", title="Num red light cameras"),
            ],
        )
        .project(type="mercator")
        .properties(width=650, height=650, title=title)
    )

    pts = (
        alt.Chart(points_df)
        .mark_circle(size=12, opacity=0.5, color=palette[-1], stroke="white", strokeWidth=0.2)
        .encode(longitude="LONGITUDE:Q", latitude="LATITUDE:Q")
    )

    return base + pts

map_redlight_cameras(comm_red_gdf, red_gdf, PALETTE_CONTRAST, "Red light cameras by community")
```


Timing of speed camera deployment
```{python}
speed["year"] = speed["GO-LIVE DATE"].dt.year

alt.Chart(speed).mark_bar().encode(
    x=alt.X("year:O", title="Go Live Year"),
    y=alt.Y("count():Q", title="Number of Cameras"),
    tooltip=["year", "count()"]
).properties(
    width=700,
    height=400,
    title="Speed Camera Deployment by Year"
)
```

Speed camera deployment in Chicago occurred in distinct waves. The first major rollout took place between 2013 and 2014, accounting for over half of all installations. After a period of relative stability, a second expansion began in 2023 and intensified in 2025. This staggered adoption pattern implies that treatment timing varies across locations, requiring an event-time framework for causal analysis.


clean crash data
```{python}
import pandas as pd

cols = pd.read_csv(CRASH_FP, nrows=0).columns.tolist()
len(cols)
crash.columns
```
```{python}
crash["CRASH_DATE"] = pd.to_datetime(crash["CRASH_DATE"], errors="coerce")
crash["CRASH_DATE"].min()
crash["CRASH_DATE"].max()
```

Crash data began since 2013-03，but the camera that came to live in 2013 did not have an enough “pre period”.


Event study-speed camera
```{python}
speed_2nd = speed[speed["GO-LIVE DATE"] >= "2023-01-01"].copy()
len(speed_2nd)
speed_2nd.columns
```

set a 200m buffer
```{python}
speed_2nd_gdf = gpd.GeoDataFrame(
    speed_2nd,
    geometry=gpd.points_from_xy(speed_2nd["LONGITUDE"],
                                 speed_2nd["LATITUDE"]),
    crs="EPSG:4326"
)

# meter coordinates
speed_2nd_gdf = speed_2nd_gdf.to_crs(epsg=26971)

# 200m buffer
speed_2nd_gdf["geometry"] = speed_2nd_gdf.buffer(200)
```

crash data geodataframe
```{python}
crash_gdf = gpd.GeoDataFrame(
    crash,
    geometry=gpd.points_from_xy(crash["LONGITUDE"],
                                 crash["LATITUDE"]),
    crs="EPSG:4326"
)

crash_gdf = crash_gdf.to_crs(epsg=26971)
```

spatial join
```{python}
crash_camera = gpd.sjoin(
    crash_gdf,
    speed_2nd_gdf[["LOCATION ID", "GO-LIVE DATE", "geometry"]],
    how="inner",
    predicate="within"
)
```

```{python}
crash_camera["crash_month"] = crash_camera["CRASH_DATE"].dt.to_period("M")
crash_camera["go_live_month"] = crash_camera["GO-LIVE DATE"].dt.to_period("M")

crash_camera["event_time"] = (
    crash_camera["crash_month"] -
    crash_camera["go_live_month"]
).apply(lambda x: x.n)

crash_camera = crash_camera[
    (crash_camera["event_time"] >= -24) &
    (crash_camera["event_time"] <= 24)
]

panel = (
    crash_camera
    .groupby(["LOCATION ID", "event_time"])
    .size()
    .reset_index(name="crash_count")
)

event_avg = (
    panel
    .groupby("event_time")["crash_count"]
    .mean()
    .reset_index()
)
```

```{python}
import altair as alt
import pandas as pd

chart = alt.Chart(event_avg).mark_line(point=True).encode(
    x=alt.X(
        "event_time:Q",
        title="Months Since Installation"
    ),
    y=alt.Y(
        "crash_count:Q",
        title="Average Monthly Crashes per Speed Camera"
    )
).properties(
    width=700,
    height=400,
    title="Event Study: Speed Cameras (Install Year ≥ 2023, ±24 Months)"
)

vline = alt.Chart(
    pd.DataFrame({"x": [0]})
).mark_rule(
    color="red",
    strokeDash=[6,4] 
).encode(
    x="x:Q"
)

chart + vline
```

We evaluate the impact of speed camera installation on traffic crashes using a staggered event study design. By spatially matching crash incidents within 200 meters of each camera and aligning time relative to installation month, we examine crash trends 24 months before and after deployment. The pre-treatment trend appears stable, suggesting no evidence of anticipatory decline. Following installation, average monthly crashes per camera decline by approximately 15–25%, indicating that speed cameras are associated with a meaningful reduction in local crash frequency.


Clean red light data
```{python}
redlight["GO LIVE DATE"] = pd.to_datetime(redlight["GO LIVE DATE"], errors="coerce")

redlight["GO LIVE DATE"].min(), redlight["GO LIVE DATE"].max()
```


Timing of red light camera deployment
```{python}
import pandas as pd
import altair as alt

df = redlight_intersection.copy()
df["GO LIVE DATE"] = pd.to_datetime(df["GO LIVE DATE"], errors="coerce")
df = df.dropna(subset=["GO LIVE DATE"])

df["install_year"] = df["GO LIVE DATE"].dt.year

year_counts = (
    df.groupby("install_year")
      .size()
      .reset_index(name="num_intersections")
)

chart_year = alt.Chart(year_counts).mark_bar().encode(
    x=alt.X("install_year:O", title="Go-Live Year"),
    y=alt.Y("num_intersections:Q", title="Number of Intersections"),
    tooltip=[
        alt.Tooltip("install_year:O", title="Year"),
        alt.Tooltip("num_intersections:Q", title="# Intersections")
    ]
).properties(
    width=700,
    height=400,
    title="Red Light Camera Deployment by Year (Intersections)"
)

chart_year
```

Since there are FIRST/SECOND/THIRD APPROACH，the same INTERSECTION may appear repeatedly.
```{python}
redlight["INTERSECTION"].nunique(), len(redlight)
```

For the same interaction, take the earliest GO LIVE DATE.
```{python}
redlight_intersection = (
    redlight.sort_values("GO LIVE DATE")
      .groupby("INTERSECTION", as_index=False)
      .agg({
          "GO LIVE DATE": "min",
          "LATITUDE": "first",
          "LONGITUDE": "first",
          "LOCATION": "first"
      })
)

redlight_intersection.shape, redlight_intersection.head()

redlight_intersection["install_year"] = redlight_intersection["GO LIVE DATE"].dt.year
redlight_intersection["install_year"].value_counts().sort_index()
```

```{python}
import geopandas as gpd

redlight_gdf = gpd.GeoDataFrame(
    redlight_intersection,
    geometry=gpd.points_from_xy(redlight_intersection["LONGITUDE"], redlight_intersection["LATITUDE"]),
    crs="EPSG:4326"
)
redlight_gdf.head()
```

Event study - red light camera
```{python}
cutoff_year = 2018

redlight_intersection_sub = redlight_intersection[
    redlight_intersection["GO LIVE DATE"].dt.year >= cutoff_year
].copy()

redlight_gdf_sub = gpd.GeoDataFrame(
    redlight_intersection_sub,
    geometry=gpd.points_from_xy(redlight_intersection_sub["LONGITUDE"],
                                redlight_intersection_sub["LATITUDE"]),
    crs="EPSG:4326"
)

redlight_proj_sub = redlight_gdf_sub.to_crs(epsg=26971)
redlight_proj_sub["buffer_200m"] = redlight_proj_sub.geometry.buffer(200)
buffer_gdf_sub = redlight_proj_sub.set_geometry("buffer_200m")
```

```{python}
crash_camera = gpd.sjoin(
    crash_proj,
    buffer_gdf_sub, 
    predicate="within",
    how="inner"
).copy()

crash_camera["CRASH_DATE"] = pd.to_datetime(crash_camera["CRASH_DATE"], errors="coerce")
crash_camera["GO LIVE DATE"] = pd.to_datetime(crash_camera["GO LIVE DATE"], errors="coerce")
crash_camera = crash_camera.dropna(subset=["CRASH_DATE","GO LIVE DATE","INTERSECTION","CRASH_RECORD_ID"])

crash_camera["crash_month"] = crash_camera["CRASH_DATE"].dt.to_period("M")
crash_camera["go_live_month"] = crash_camera["GO LIVE DATE"].dt.to_period("M")
crash_camera["event_time"] = (crash_camera["crash_month"] - crash_camera["go_live_month"]).apply(lambda x: x.n)

event_min, event_max = -24, 24
crash_camera = crash_camera[(crash_camera["event_time"] >= event_min) & (crash_camera["event_time"] <= event_max)].copy()

# intersection × event_time 
panel = (
    crash_camera.groupby(["INTERSECTION","event_time"])["CRASH_RECORD_ID"]
    .nunique()
    .reset_index(name="crash_count")
)


intersections = panel["INTERSECTION"].unique()
event_grid = np.arange(event_min, event_max + 1)
full_index = pd.MultiIndex.from_product([intersections, event_grid], names=["INTERSECTION","event_time"])

panel_full = (
    panel.set_index(["INTERSECTION","event_time"])[["crash_count"]]
    .reindex(full_index)
    .fillna({"crash_count": 0})
    .reset_index()
)

event_avg = (
    panel_full.groupby("event_time")["crash_count"]
    .mean()
    .reset_index()
)
```

```{python}
import altair as alt
import pandas as pd

chart = alt.Chart(event_avg).mark_line(point=True).encode(
    x=alt.X("event_time:Q", title="Months Since Installation"),
    y=alt.Y("crash_count:Q",
            title="Avg Monthly Crashes per Intersection (within 200m)",
            scale=alt.Scale(zero=False)),
    tooltip=[
        alt.Tooltip("event_time:Q", title="Event time (months)"),
        alt.Tooltip("crash_count:Q", title="Avg crashes", format=".2f")
    ]
).properties(
    width=700,
    height=400,
    title=f"Event Study: Red Light Cameras (Install Year ≥ {cutoff_year}, ±24 Months)"
)

vline = alt.Chart(pd.DataFrame({"x":[0]})).mark_rule(strokeDash=[6,4], color="red").encode(x="x:Q")
chart + vline

```
